title: For Hire
content:
Work with might and main,
        Or with hand and heart,
    Work with soul and brain,
        Or with holy art,
    Thread, or genius' fire--
        Make a vest, or verse--
    If 'tis done for hire,
        It is done the worse.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Morris Rosenfeld, titled "For Hire", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
